title: Cloudberry t/a Rehoboth build
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gallery\n Sponsored Content","html":"Gallery\n Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Creating spaces you’ll love for years to come Cloudberry, trading as Rehoboth Build, is a family-owned construction company dedicated to creating homes and complexes of a high standard, ensuring exceptional customer satisfaction.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Creating spaces you’ll love for years to come Cloudberry, trading as Rehoboth Build, is a family-owned construction company dedicated to creating homes and complexes of a high standard, ensuring exceptional customer satisfaction."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We specialise in state-of-the-art homes and innovative estate designs. The company was founded by André Reitsma in Gauteng in 2007, and his son, Andries, later joined the company. In 2020, Andries relocatedto Mossel Bay in 2020 to expand the business to the Western Cape.","html":"We specialise in state-of-the-art homes and innovative estate designs. The company was founded by André Reitsma in Gauteng in 2007, and his son, Andries, later joined the company. In 2020, Andries relocated
to Mossel Bay in 2020 to expand the business to the Western Cape."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Cloudberry t/a Rehoboth Build is an approved builder in both Pinnacle Point (Mossel Bay) and Val de Vie (Paarl/Franschhoek)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We strive to build top quality houses, providing dedicated attention to each of our clients, and it is therefore a great honour to be nominated for this prestigious award and the recognition of our hard work.","html":"We strive to build top quality houses, providing dedicated attention to each of our clients, and it is therefore a great honour to be nominated for this prestigious award and the recognition of our hard work."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We attain excellence in both quality and timely completed value-added projects.","html":"We attain excellence in both quality and timely completed value-added projects."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We work by our code of honour:","html":"We work by our code of honour:"},{"type":"list","items":["Personal interaction with each and every client","Personal focus to detail","Honesty and integrity","Respect towards our clients","Transparency","Building client trust"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Proudly localWe are committed to the local community. Our focus is to develop and growing the local subcontractorsby transferring our financial and operational skills.","html":"Proudly local
We are committed to the local community. Our focus is to develop and growing the local subcontractors
by transferring our financial and operational skills."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Making use of only local sub-contractors, we not only deliver high quality turn-key projects with realistic PC amounts, but also contribute to the local economy in doing so.","html":"Making use of only local sub-contractors, we not only deliver high quality turn-key projects with realistic PC amounts, but also contribute to the local economy in doing so."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"PHOTO GALLERY: Cloudberry: State of the art homes and innovative estate designs","html":"PHOTO GALLERY: Cloudberry: State of the art homes and innovative estate designs"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Our comprehensive and all-inclusive pricing structure is designed to accommodate our clients, encompass realistic expectations and avoid extra costs.","html":"Our comprehensive and all-inclusive pricing structure is designed to accommodate our clients, encompass realistic expectations and avoid extra costs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Bespoke homes built to top standards. At a time when semigration to the Western Cape creates a huge demand for new housing, we stay on top in the competitive market by providing quality that is above reproach and building relationships of respect, loyalty and trust with our clients.","html":"Bespoke homes built to top standards. At a time when semigration to the Western Cape creates a huge demand for new housing, we stay on top in the competitive market by providing quality that is above reproach and building relationships of respect, loyalty and trust with our clients."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"We do continuous research and negotiation on pricing to ensure cost-effectiveness without sacrificing quality."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In addition, we keep researching new opportunities, networking with agents, the municipality and suppliers, and we meet the building requirements set by the top SA Estates (Pinnacle Point, Val de Vie & Midstream Estate) in South Africa.","html":"In addition, we keep researching new opportunities, networking with agents, the municipality and suppliers, and we meet the building requirements set by the top SA Estates (Pinnacle Point, Val de Vie & Midstream Estate) in South Africa."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Our clients can testify to our passion, loyalty and integrity. We rest assured that their votes in this competition will prove that we are the Best of Mossel Bay!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Vote for us here: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/mossel-bay/","html":"Vote for us here: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/mossel-bay/"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"www.rehobothbuild.co.za","html":"www.rehobothbuild.co.za"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
